system_name: Fraud Detection System for Digital Payments and Banking

observability.justification: Cardholder intent and compromised credentials are hidden at decision time.

agents.justification: Co-exists with card-network rule engines, other bank agents, and adversarial fraudsters.

determinism.justification: Identical features can yield different outcomes due to hidden variables.

temporal_structure.justification: Each decision affects future risk scoring; probe sequences precede high-value fraud.

dynamism.justification: Fraud patterns and adversarial tactics evolve continuously during operation.

state_space.justification: Amounts, coordinates, time deltas, and risk scores are real-valued continuous variables.

utility_function.formula: U = alpha * Recall_fraud - beta * FalsePositiveRate - gamma * DetectionLatency
utility_function.trade_off: Security (fraud recall) vs Customer Experience (false positive rate)
